title: Firsthand: Seven Years Inside Applied Intuition, the Quietly Dominant Physical AI Company I joined Applied Intuition as a new-grad engineer back in early 2019, when it was just a handful of us working above a bar on Murphy Ave in Sunnyvale. Today I'm Deputy CTO of the company (that now has over 1,000 engineers). Here's why I've stayed all these years.

title: Anthropic found a hidden space where Claude puzzles over concepts
